name: io.github.pvliesdonk/image-generation-mcp
title: Image Generation MCP Server
description: MCP server for AI image generation via OpenAI, Stable Diffusion (SD WebUI), or placeholders.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_READ_ONLY
environmentVariables.description: When true, write-tagged tools (generate_image) are hidden. Set to false to enable image generation.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_SCRATCH_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory for saved generated images. Created automatically on first use.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_DEFAULT_PROVIDER
environmentVariables.description: Default provider selection: auto (keyword-based), openai, sd_webui, or placeholder. Deprecated alias 'a1111' is also accepted.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key. Enables the OpenAI provider (gpt-image-1, dall-e-3) when set.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_SD_WEBUI_HOST
environmentVariables.description: SD WebUI base URL (e.g. http://localhost:7860). Enables the SD WebUI provider when set.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_SD_WEBUI_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: SD WebUI checkpoint name for model-aware preset detection (SD 1.5 vs SDXL vs Lightning vs Flux).

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_A1111_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Deprecated — use SD_WEBUI_HOST instead. Accepted as fallback.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_A1111_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Deprecated — use SD_WEBUI_MODEL instead. Accepted as fallback.

environmentVariables.name: FASTMCP_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Log level for FastMCP internals; app loggers default to INFO, -v overrides both to DEBUG.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_SERVER_NAME
environmentVariables.description: Server name shown to MCP clients in the initialization response.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_INSTRUCTIONS
environmentVariables.description: System-level instructions injected into LLM context.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_BEARER_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Static bearer token for HTTP authentication.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_AUTH_MODE
environmentVariables.description: OIDC auth mode: 'remote' (JWKS validation) or 'oidc-proxy' (OAuth proxy). Auto-detected if not set.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Public base URL for OIDC redirects (e.g. https://mcp.example.com). Required for OIDC.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_OIDC_CONFIG_URL
environmentVariables.description: OIDC discovery endpoint URL. Required for OIDC.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_OIDC_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: OIDC client ID. Required for OIDC.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_OIDC_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: OIDC client secret. Required for OIDC.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_OIDC_JWT_SIGNING_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Signing key for OIDC session JWTs (critical on Linux/Docker).

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_OIDC_AUDIENCE
environmentVariables.description: Expected JWT audience claim. Leave unset if your provider does not set one.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_OIDC_REQUIRED_SCOPES
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated required OIDC scopes.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_OIDC_VERIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Verify access token JWT instead of id_token.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_READ_ONLY
environmentVariables.description: When true, write-tagged tools (generate_image) are hidden. Set to false to enable image generation.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_SCRATCH_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory for saved generated images inside the container.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_DEFAULT_PROVIDER
environmentVariables.description: Default provider selection: auto (keyword-based), openai, sd_webui, or placeholder. Deprecated alias 'a1111' is also accepted.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key. Enables the OpenAI provider (gpt-image-1, dall-e-3) when set.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_SD_WEBUI_HOST
environmentVariables.description: SD WebUI base URL (e.g. http://localhost:7860). Enables the SD WebUI provider when set.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_SD_WEBUI_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: SD WebUI checkpoint name for model-aware preset detection (SD 1.5 vs SDXL vs Lightning vs Flux).

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_A1111_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Deprecated — use SD_WEBUI_HOST instead. Accepted as fallback.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_A1111_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Deprecated — use SD_WEBUI_MODEL instead. Accepted as fallback.

environmentVariables.name: FASTMCP_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Log level for FastMCP internals; app loggers default to INFO, -v overrides both to DEBUG.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_SERVER_NAME
environmentVariables.description: Server name shown to MCP clients in the initialization response.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_INSTRUCTIONS
environmentVariables.description: System-level instructions injected into LLM context.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_HTTP_PATH
environmentVariables.description: HTTP endpoint mount path for streamable-HTTP transport.

environmentVariables.name: PUID
environmentVariables.description: Run as this UID (Docker entrypoint).

environmentVariables.name: PGID
environmentVariables.description: Run as this GID (Docker entrypoint).

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_BEARER_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Static bearer token for HTTP authentication.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_AUTH_MODE
environmentVariables.description: OIDC auth mode: 'remote' (JWKS validation) or 'oidc-proxy' (OAuth proxy). Auto-detected if not set.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Public base URL for OIDC redirects (e.g. https://mcp.example.com). Required for OIDC.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_OIDC_CONFIG_URL
environmentVariables.description: OIDC discovery endpoint URL. Required for OIDC.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_OIDC_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: OIDC client ID. Required for OIDC.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_OIDC_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: OIDC client secret. Required for OIDC.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_OIDC_JWT_SIGNING_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Signing key for OIDC session JWTs (critical on Linux/Docker).

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_OIDC_AUDIENCE
environmentVariables.description: Expected JWT audience claim. Leave unset if your provider does not set one.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_OIDC_REQUIRED_SCOPES
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated required OIDC scopes.

environmentVariables.name: IMAGE_GENERATION_MCP_OIDC_VERIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Verify access token JWT instead of id_token.
